since_last: 34% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.17%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +2.12% · Gold +0.00% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 34% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.17%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.17%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: LSCC is the standout at +7.24%
cards.body: Leaders: LSCC +7.24%, MU +4.24%, SMCI +3.65%, INTC +3.01%, VRT +2.57%. Laggards: SPCX -4.82%, SAP -3.06%, APP -2.49%, CRNC -2.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.82% at $176.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.82% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
